output.name: Volume of Output
output.description: Restores the ability to send visible messages into the System.

variables.name: Volume of Variables
variables.description: Restores the ability to store and reuse values.

loops.name: Volume of Loops
loops.description: Restores the ability to repeat actions without writing them over and over.

conditions.name: Volume of Conditions
conditions.description: Restores the ability to make decisions inside the System.

functions.name: Volume of Functions
functions.description: Restores the ability to build reusable modules from logic.
